003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.time.*;
025import java.time.temporal.*;
026import java.util.*;
027import java.util.function.*;
028
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
036
037/**
038 * Session for serializing objects to INI format.
039 */
040@SuppressWarnings({
041   "resource", // IniWriter lifecycle managed by SerializerPipe
042   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for serializer session hierarchy
043   "java:S115", // Constants use naming conventions that embed type info or config keys (e.g. PROP_trimWhitespace)
044   "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for serialization logic
045   "java:S6541"  // Acceptable for session implementation
046})
047public class IniSerializerSession extends WriterSerializerSession implements RecordWritable {
048
049   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
050   private static final String SECTION_PATH_DELIMITER = "/";
051
052   /**
053    * Builder for INI serializer session.
054    */
055   public static class Builder extends WriterSerializerSession.Builder<Builder> {
056
057      private IniSerializer ctx;
058
059      protected Builder(IniSerializer ctx) {
060         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
061         this.ctx = ctx;
062      }
063
064      @Override
065      public IniSerializerSession build() {
066         return new IniSerializerSession(this);
067      }
068   }
069
070   /**
071    * Creates a session builder.
072    *
073    * @param ctx The serializer context.
074    * @return The builder.
075    */
076   public static Builder create(IniSerializer ctx) {
077      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
078   }
079
080   private final IniSerializer ctx;
081
082   protected IniSerializerSession(Builder builder) {
083      super(builder);
084      ctx = builder.ctx;
085   }
086
087   @Override /* RecordWritable */
088   public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
089      return RecordAdapter.writer(this, output);
090   }
091
092   @Override /* RecordWritable */
093   public boolean isRecordStreaming() {
094      return false;
095   }
096
097   @Override
098   protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe out, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException {
099      if (o == null)
100         return;
101      var aType = getClassMetaForObject(o);
102      if (!aType.isBean() && !aType.isMap())
103         throw new SerializeException(this, "INI format requires a bean or Map<String,?> at root. Got: {0}", aType.inner().getName());
104      var w = getIniWriter(out);
105      var eType = getExpectedRootType(o);
106      if (isAddBeanTypes() || isAddRootType()) {
107         var typeName = getBeanTypeName(this, eType, aType, null);
108         if (typeName == null)
109            typeName = aType.inner().getSimpleName();
110         var typeKey = getBeanTypePropertyName(eType);
111         w.keyValue(typeKey, typeName);
112      }
113      if (aType.isBean())
114         serializeBean(w, toBeanMap(o), "");
115      else
116         serializeMapAtRoot(w, (Map<?,?>)o, eType);
117   }
118
119   protected final IniWriter getIniWriter(SerializerPipe out) {
120      var output = out.getRawOutput();
121      if (output instanceof IniWriter w)
122         return w;
123      var w = new IniWriter(out.getWriter(), isUseWhitespace(), getMaxIndent(), isTrimStrings(),
124         ctx.kvSeparator, ctx.spacedSeparator, getUriResolver());
125      out.setWriter(w);
126      return w;
127   }
128
129   private void serializeBean(IniWriter w, BeanMap<?> m, String sectionPath) throws IOException, SerializeException {
130      Predicate<Object> checkNull = x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x);
131      var simple = new ArrayList<Map.Entry<BeanPropertyMeta, Object>>();
132      var sections = new ArrayList<Map.Entry<BeanPropertyMeta, Object>>();
133
134      m.forEachValue(checkNull, (pMeta, key, value, thrown) -> {
135         if (nn(thrown))
136            onBeanGetterException(pMeta, thrown);
137         var cMeta = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
138         if (canIgnoreValue(pMeta, key, value))
139            return;
140         var aType = value == null ? cMeta : getClassMetaForObject(value, cMeta);
141         var iniMeta = ctx.getIniBeanPropertyMeta(pMeta);
142         // Collections/arrays are written as inline key-value (not sections), so they must appear in
143         // the default section before any [section] headers for correct parsing
144         if (iniMeta.isJson5Encoding() || isSimpleOrJson5Inline(aType, value)
145            || aType.isCollectionOrArrayOrOptional()) {
146            simple.add(new AbstractMap.SimpleEntry<>(pMeta, value));
147         } else {
148            sections.add(new AbstractMap.SimpleEntry<>(pMeta, value));
149         }
150      });
151
152      // Pass 1: simple properties and JSON5-inline values
153      for (var e : simple) {
154         BeanPropertyMeta pMeta = e.getKey();
155         if (ctx.useComments) {
156            var iniMeta = ctx.getIniBeanPropertyMeta(pMeta);
157            if (ne(iniMeta.getComment()))
158               w.comment(iniMeta.getComment());
159         }
160         writeKeyValue(w, pMeta.getName(), e.getValue(), pMeta);
161      }
162
163      // Pass 2: bean and Map sections
164      for (var e : sections) {
165         BeanPropertyMeta pMeta = e.getKey();
166         Object value = e.getValue();
167         var iniMeta = ctx.getIniBeanPropertyMeta(pMeta);
168         var key = ne(iniMeta.getSection()) ? iniMeta.getSection() : pMeta.getName();
169         var cMeta = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
170         var newPath = sectionPath.isEmpty() ? key : sectionPath + SECTION_PATH_DELIMITER + key;
171
172         if (nn(value)) {
173            if (isUseWhitespace() && !sectionPath.isEmpty())
174               w.blankLine();
175            var aType = getClassMetaForObject(value, cMeta);
176            if (aType.isBean()) {
177               w.section(newPath);
178               serializeBean(w, toBeanMap(value), newPath);
179            } else if (aType.isMap()) {
180               var map = (Map<?,?>)value;
181               if (isSimpleMap(map, aType)) {
182                  w.section(newPath);
183                  serializeMapSection(w, map, aType);
184               } else {
185                  if (ctx.useComments && ne(iniMeta.getComment()))
186                     w.comment(iniMeta.getComment());
187                  writeKeyValue(w, pMeta.getName(), value, pMeta);
188               }
189            } else if (aType.isCollection() || aType.isArray()) {
190               if (ctx.useComments && ne(iniMeta.getComment()))
191                  w.comment(iniMeta.getComment());
192               writeKeyValue(w, pMeta.getName(), value, pMeta);
193            }
194         } else if (isKeepNullProperties()) {
195            if (ctx.useComments && ne(iniMeta.getComment()))
196               w.comment(iniMeta.getComment());
197            writeKeyValue(w, pMeta.getName(), null, pMeta);
198         }
199      }
200   }
201
202   private void serializeMapAtRoot(IniWriter w, Map<?,?> map, ClassMeta<?> type) throws SerializeException {
203      Predicate<Object> checkNull = x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x);
204      forEachEntry(map, e -> {
205         var k = toString(e.getKey());
206         var v = e.getValue();
207         if (!checkNull.test(v))
208            return;
209         try {
210            var aType = getClassMetaForObject(v, type);
211            if (aType.isBean()) {
212               if (isUseWhitespace())
213                  w.blankLine();
214               w.section(k);
215               serializeBean(w, toBeanMap(v), k);
216            } else if (aType.isMap() && v != null) {
217               var nested = (Map<?,?>)v;
218               if (isSimpleMap(nested, aType)) {
219                  if (isUseWhitespace())
220                     w.blankLine();
221                  w.section(k);
222                  serializeMapSection(w, nested, aType);
223               } else {
224                  writeKeyValue(w, k, v, null);
225               }
226            } else {
227               writeKeyValue(w, k, v, null);
228            }
229         } catch (SerializeException | IOException ex) {
230            throw rex(ex);
231         }
232      });
233   }
234
235   @SuppressWarnings({
236      "unused",    // type reserved for future type-aware section serialization
237      "java:S1172" // Same as above
238   })
239   private void serializeMapSection(IniWriter w, Map<?,?> map, ClassMeta<?> type) throws SerializeException {
240      Predicate<Object> checkNull = x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x);
241      forEachEntry(map, e -> {
242         var k = toString(e.getKey());
243         var v = e.getValue();
244         if (!checkNull.test(v))
245            return;
246         writeKeyValue(w, k, v, null);
247      });
248   }
249
250   private void writeKeyValue(IniWriter w, String key, Object value, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws SerializeException {
251      ClassMeta<?> cMeta;
252      if (pMeta != null)
253         cMeta = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
254      else if (value != null)
255         cMeta = getClassMetaForObject(value);
256      else
257         cMeta = object();
258      var aType = value == null ? cMeta : getClassMetaForObject(value, cMeta);
259
260      var swap = aType.getSwap(this);
261      if (nn(swap)) {
262         value = swap(swap, value);
263         aType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
264         if (aType.isObject())
265            aType = getClassMetaForObject(value);
266      }
267
268      if (value == null && !isKeepNullProperties())
269         return;
270
271      String valueStr;
272      if (value == null)
273         valueStr = "null";
274      else if (isSimpleOrJson5Inline(aType, value))
275         valueStr = formatSimpleValue(value, aType);
276      else
277         valueStr = encodeComplexValue(value);
278      w.keyValue(key, valueStr);
279   }
280
281   private String formatSimpleValue(Object value, ClassMeta<?> aType) throws SerializeException {
282      if (aType.isCharSequence() || aType.isUri()) {
283         var s = toString(value);
284         return needsQuoting(s) ? "'" + s.replace("'", "''") + "'" : s;
285      }
286      if (aType.isNumber())
287         return value.toString();
288      if (aType.isBoolean())
289         return ((Boolean)value).toString();
290      if (aType.isEnum())
291         return ((Enum<?>)value).name();
292      if (aType.isDate())
293         return serializeDate((Date)value, aType);
294      if (aType.isCalendar())
295         return serializeCalendar(value, aType);
296      if (aType.isTemporal())
297         return serializeTemporal((TemporalAccessor)value, aType);
298      if (aType.isDuration())
299         return serializeDuration((Duration)value);
300      if (aType.isPeriod())
301         return serializePeriod((Period)value);
302      return toString(value);
303   }
304
305   private static boolean needsQuoting(String s) {
306      if (e(s))
307         return true;
308      if (s.equals("null") || s.equalsIgnoreCase("true") || s.equalsIgnoreCase("false"))
309         return true;
310      // Whole-string numeric check; mirrors -?\d+(\.\d+)?([eE][+-]?\d+)? (integer part allows leading zeros).
311      if (StringUtils.matchNumberPrefix(s, true) == s.length())
312         return true;
313      if (s.contains("=") || s.contains("[") || s.contains("]") || s.contains("#") || s.contains("\n"))
314         return true;
315      var trimmed = s.trim();
316      return !trimmed.equals(s);
317   }
318
319   private String encodeComplexValue(Object value) throws SerializeException {
320      return getJson5Serializer().serialize(value);
321   }
322
323   private JsonSerializer getJson5Serializer() {
324      var b = Json5Serializer.create().marshallingContext((MarshallingContext)getContext());
325      if (isAddBeanTypes())
326         b.addBeanTypes();
327      if (isAddRootType())
328         b.addRootType();
329      return b.build();
330   }
331
332   @SuppressWarnings({
333      "unused",    // value accepted for future value-aware inline detection
334      "java:S1172" // Same as above
335   })
336   private static boolean isSimpleOrJson5Inline(ClassMeta<?> aType, Object value) {
337      if (aType.isBean() || aType.isMap())
338         return false;
339      if (aType.isCollection() || aType.isArray())
340         return false;
341      return !aType.isStreamable();
342   }
343
344   private boolean isSimpleMap(Map<?,?> map, ClassMeta<?> mapType) {
345      if (map == null)
346         return false;
347      var keyType = mapType.getKeyType();
348      // When keyType is null or Object, check keys at runtime; otherwise require CharSequence
349      if (keyType != null && !keyType.isCharSequence() && !keyType.isObject())
350         return false;
351      for (Object k : map.keySet()) {
352         if (k != null && !(k instanceof CharSequence))
353            return false;
354      }
355      for (Object v : map.values()) {
356         if (v != null) {
357            ClassMeta<?> vType = getClassMetaForObject(v);
358            if (vType.isBean() || vType.isMap() || vType.isCollectionOrArray())
359               return false;
360         }
361      }
362      return true;
363   }
364}
